---
name: Change request
about: Request a concrete code or workflow change
title: "[Change]: "
labels: ["change-request"]
assignees: []
---

## Outcome

Describe the exact result you want.

## Why

Explain why this change matters now.

## Scope

List the files, screens, flows, or behaviors that should change.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] I described the expected user-visible outcome.
- [ ] I listed the constraints or non-goals.
- [ ] I can tell when this change is done.

## Verification

Describe how to verify the change locally.

## Notes

Add screenshots, configs, logs, or examples if they help.
